title: Extended AE
description: Turbo-boosts Applied Energistics 2 with fan-favorite QoL blocks!
body:
## 🚀 What’s Extended AE?

Extended AE is an add-on for Applied Energistics 2 that streamlines storage and crafting workflows. 

---

## ❗ Attention

Extended AE doesn't support JEI since 1.21, install [FTB JEI Extra](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-jei-extras) if you want to use JEI with Extended AE.

---

## 🔑 Highlights

- 🧩 **36-slot Pattern Provider & Interface** – craft or export huge recipe sets in one block.
- 🌊 **Infinity Cells (Water / Cobblestone)** – endless basic resources on tap.  
- ⚡ **x8 Faster Import / Export Buses** – high-throughput item I/O.   
- 🔎 **Extended Pattern Access Terminal** (wired + wireless) – huge autocrafting UI.  
- 🛠️ **Pattern Modifier** – batch-edit & clone crafting patterns.
- 🏷️ **Tag Export & Storage Buses** – filter/output by any item tag.  
- 🎯 **Precise Export Bus** – per-slot exact exporting.
- 📦 **Mod Export & Storage Buses** – inventory filters by mod ID.  
- 🔄 **Active Formation Plane** – places blocks only on redstone.   
- ⚙️ **Extended Inscriber & Extended Charger** – parallel chip making & charging.  
- 🔬 **Crystal Assembler & Restorer** – instant pure-crystal growth & repair.   
- 🏗️ **Extended Molecular Assembler** – x8 parallel crafting.  
- 🧬 **Assembler Matrix** - scalable multiblock crafter for extreme speed 🔥
- 🧴 **ME Canner** – fills (or now empties) cans & containers.    
- 📡 **ME Wireless Connector** – long-range network bridge.  

---

| MC | Fabric | Forge | NeoForge |
|----|:------:|:-----:|:-------:|
